caption: A man sits in a studio setting for a recording, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" visible on the chest, a black baseball cap, and grey over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a stand. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeated logo with the words "HUSTLE" and several stars. To his right, a screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen overlays appear in the lower corners, with one reading "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another stating "BOSS TALK 101." As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head and shoulders while maintaining his position in front of the microphone. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
